---
name: Feature request
about: New capability or change to existing behavior
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem
<!-- What hurts today. Quantify if you can. -->

## Proposed direction
<!-- Optional. A sketch, not a spec. -->

## Why now
<!-- What changed that makes this worth picking up? -->

## Out of scope
<!-- What this is NOT, to prevent scope creep. -->

## Change class (best guess)
- [ ] Bugfix / copy / small refactor — no doc required
- [ ] New feature or public-API change — **RFC required**
- [ ] Architecture / vendor / runtime decision — **ADR required**
- [ ] Revenue / legal / compliance impact — **PRD required**

See [`AGENTS.md` § Lifecycle](../../AGENTS.md#lifecycle--gates-by-change-class).
